'''Robert Pike Daniel''' is a voice actor who provided voices for two ''Star Wars'' video games.

==''Star Wars'' filmography==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' - ATC-Landing Platform
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' - [[OOM-14/Legends|OOM-14]], Royal Knight, [[TIE/LN starfighter]] [[TIE pilot|pilot]]
